debug.name: MTT debug mode
debug.hint: Enables additional console information for the Merchants, Trades and Transactions module.

itemQuantityPath.name: Quantity path
itemQuantityPath.hint: Path in the item system to read the available quantity. Example: system.quantity

itemDeliveryQuantityPerLotPath.name: Item delivered quantity per lot path
itemDeliveryQuantityPerLotPath.hint: Optional system path used to read how many units are delivered for one sold lot. If empty, the GM can enter this quantity on the product row.

deliveryItemQuantityPath.name: Delivery actor: quantity path
deliveryItemQuantityPath.hint: Path used only when delivering an item to a client actor. Leave empty to reuse the general quantity path. Example: system.quantity.value

deliveryItemMaxQuantityPath.name: Delivery actor: maximum stack size path
deliveryItemMaxQuantityPath.hint: Path used only when delivering an item to a client actor. An empty or invalid value means the stack is unlimited. Example: system.quantity.max

allowExtendedItemMerge.name: Allow extended merge of delivered items
allowExtendedItemMerge.hint: Allows MTT to merge a purchased item with one already on the actor when no reliable common MTT origin is found, by comparing name, type, subtype, base price and currency. Disabled by default.

writeDeliveryDescriptionInfo.name: Write origin and secret info in delivered item descriptions
writeDeliveryDescriptionInfo.hint: If enabled, MTT adds a visible line at the start of delivered item descriptions indicating the merchant and transaction, along with a Foundry secret block if the product had secret information. If disabled, the delivered item description is not modified.

itemDescriptionPath.name: Description path
itemDescriptionPath.hint: Path in the item system to read the description. Example: system.description.value

itemSecretDescriptionPath.name: Secret description path for delivered Items
itemSecretDescriptionPath.hint: Path where MTT writes secret information on delivered items. If identical to the visible description path, secrets are added in a Foundry secret block in the same field. If different, secret information is written to this separate field. If empty, secret information is not copied to the delivered item.

allowedProductTypes.name: Allowed item types as products
allowedProductTypes.hint: Comma-separated list of types. Leave empty to allow all types.

allowedServiceTypes.name: Allowed item types as services
allowedServiceTypes.hint: Comma-separated list of types. Leave empty to allow all types.

itemCategoryPaths.name: Automatic category paths
itemCategoryPaths.hint: Paths tested to automatically determine an item or service category. One path per line. The first non-empty result is used.

useItemTypeAsCategoryFallback.name: Use item type as category fallback
useItemTypeAsCategoryFallback.hint: If no category path yields a result, uses the Foundry item type as the automatic category.

categoryLabelMap.name: Automatic category labels
categoryLabelMap.hint: Mapping between technical values and displayed labels. Format: value=Label, one per line.

defaultCustomCategories.name: Default custom categories
defaultCustomCategories.hint: List of custom categories automatically added to new merchants. One category per line.

itemSubcategoryPath.name: Product subcategory path
itemSubcategoryPath.hint: Path read from the Item to display a discrete subcategory icon in the catalog. Leave empty to disable this feature.

openConfigWindow.name: MTT Configuration
openConfigWindow.label: Open configuration
openConfigWindow.hint: Opens the MTT module advanced configuration window.

openGlobalJournal.name: Global transaction journal
openGlobalJournal.label: Open global journal
openGlobalJournal.hint: Opens the MTT global transaction journal for all merchants.

currencies.name: Configured currencies
currencies.hint: List of MTT module currencies. Managed through the MTT configuration window.

allowedMerchantActorTypes.name: Actor types convertible to MTT merchants
allowedMerchantActorTypes.hint: Internal JSON managed through the MTT configuration window.

dialog.removeAuthorizationMessage: Removing this client's authorization will cancel their active session without performing any transaction.
dialog.removeActorMessage: The Foundry actor will not be deleted. Only their entry on this merchant will be removed.
dialog.sellerItemTitle: Add an item sold or given
dialog.clearSessionMessage: The session will be reset. No transaction will be performed.
dialog.noTransactionNoJournal: No transaction will be performed and no journal entry will be created.

transaction.previewOnly: Preview only: no changes have been made yet.

deleteItem.title: Delete item
deleteItem.content: Do you really want to delete this item from the merchant?

removeMerchant.title: Remove MTT shop
removeMerchant.content: This action will delete the MTT shop attached to this actor: catalog, services, sessions, journal, reference state, and trade configuration. The system actor, its native sheet, and its personal inventory will not be deleted. Continue?

notifications.onlyItemsCanBeDropped: Only items can be added to the merchant.
notifications.productQuantityIncreased: The quantity of the existing product has been increased.
notifications.invalidQuantity: The quantity must be a positive number or zero.
notifications.invalidPrice: The price must be a positive number or zero.
notifications.invalidServicePrice: The service price must be a positive number or zero.
notifications.invalidServiceQuantity: The service quantity must be a positive number or zero.
notifications.onlyItemsCanCreateServices: Only items can be used to create a service.
notifications.productTypeNotAllowed: This item type is not allowed as a product.
notifications.serviceTypeNotAllowed: This item type is not allowed as a service.
notifications.invalidTradePercent: The percentage must be a positive number or zero.
notifications.invalidWalletAmount: The currency amount must be a positive number or zero.
notifications.invalidSessionQuantity: The requested quantity must be a positive number.
notifications.notEnoughQuantity: The requested quantity exceeds the available quantity.
notifications.emptySessionLabel: The session name cannot be empty.
notifications.onlyItemsCanBeSold: Only items can be added to what the player sells or gives.
notifications.sellerItemAddedToSession: Item added to what the player sells or gives.
notifications.sellerItemRemoved: Item removed from what the player sells or gives.
notifications.invalidSellerItemQuantity: The sold or given quantity must be a positive number.
notifications.notEnoughSellerItemQuantity: The requested quantity exceeds the available quantity on the source item.
notifications.invalidSellerItemPrice: The proposed value must be a positive number or zero.
notifications.sessionCheckSuccess: Check complete: no blocking issues detected.
notifications.sessionCheckFailed: Check complete: blocking issues were detected.
notifications.onlyActorsCanBeClients: Only actors can be added as clients.
notifications.clientAlreadyExists: This client is already present on the merchant.
notifications.clientAccessSessionRemoved: The client's active session has been deleted.
notifications.clientAlreadyTrading: This client already has an active session with another merchant.
notifications.selectClientBeforeAdding: Select a client before adding an item.
notifications.createSessionBeforeAdding: Create a session for this client before adding an item.
notifications.selectSessionBeforeAdding: Select a session before adding an item.
notifications.clientHasNoSession: This client does not have a session yet.
notifications.merchantProductNotSellable: You cannot add a merchant product to what the player sells or gives.
notifications.cannotGiveMerchantProduct: You cannot add a merchant product to what the player gives.
notifications.missingProposedPrice: You must propose a price for this item.
notifications.selectSessionBeforeAction: Select a session before performing this action.
notifications.sessionSocketNoResponse: The session change request received no response.
notifications.sessionSocketNoHandler: No connected GM or owner can handle this request.
notifications.sessionSocketRequestDenied: The session change request was denied.
notifications.noItemPricePath: No item price path configured. Check the module currencies table.

merchantConversion.gmOnly: Only the GM can convert an actor into an MTT merchant.
merchantConversion.alreadyMerchant: This actor already has an MTT shop.
merchantConversion.typeNotAllowed: Actor type '{type}' is not allowed for MTT shops.
merchantConversion.noMerchant: This actor does not have an MTT shop.

merchantRemoval.success: The MTT shop attached to {name} has been removed.

price.freePriceTooltip: Propose a price to the seller
price.freePriceIconTooltip: Propose a price to the seller
price.minimumPriceHint: Internal GM reference. Not displayed to buyers.

access.title: Authorized clients
access.dropHelp: Drop a character or NPC here to add them to the merchant's clients.
access.dropTooltip: Drop an actor to add them to the merchant's clients
access.removeActorContent: Do you really want to remove this actor from the merchant?
access.removeActorWithSessionContent: An active session exists for this actor. Do you want to remove the actor from the merchant and delete the active session?
access.removeAuthorizationContent: A transaction session is active for this client. Do you want to remove the authorization and delete the active session?
access.notAuthorizedForTrade: This client is not authorized to trade with this merchant.
access.noAuthorizedClient: No client is authorized to trade with this merchant.
access.multipleAuthorizedClients: Multiple clients are authorized. Select a client or a session before adding items.

journal.title: Journal
journal.secretIndicator: Secret information was present during the transaction.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Items currently offered or stored by this merchant.
products.dropHelp: Drop items here from the sidebar or a compendium.

empty.title: No products
empty.text: This merchant does not contain any item yet.
empty.help: Unlock the sheet to create or add items.

category.label: Category
category.deleteContent: Do you really want to delete this category?
category.notEmpty: The category must be empty before it can be deleted.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Services offered by this merchant.
services.deleteContent: Do you really want to delete this service?
services.name: Service name
services.dropHelp: Drop an item here to create a service linked to an item.

empty.title: No services
empty.text: This merchant does not offer any services yet.
empty.help: Unlock the sheet to add a service.

secrets.title: Secret information
secrets.name: Secret name
secrets.deleteConfirm: Delete secret information for this item?

referenceState.title: Reference state
referenceState.description: Saves the entire catalog (products, services, categories, quantities, visibilities, prices) as the shop's base state.
referenceState.confirmContent: Restore the shop catalog to the saved state? Products or services added since the save will disappear, and deleted ones will reappear. The manager actor and their system inventory will not be modified.

sessions.title: Transaction session
sessions.selectClient: Select an authorized client to open a session.
sessions.noSelectedClient: Select an authorized client to open a session.
sessions.createSessionForClient: Create a session for this client
sessions.clientAlreadyTrading: This client already has an active session with another merchant.
sessions.selectClientBeforeAdding: Select a client before adding an item.
sessions.createSessionBeforeAdding: Create a session for this client before adding an item.
sessions.selectSessionBeforeAdding: Select a session before adding an item.
sessions.noAuthorizedClient: No client is authorized to trade with this merchant.
sessions.multipleClientsSelectRequired: Multiple clients available. Select a session before adding an item.
sessions.label: Session name
sessions.deleteContent: Do you really want to delete this session?
sessions.placeholder: The active transaction will be displayed here.
sessions.moneyAdjustmentHint: The monetary adjustment automatically balances both sides of the transaction.
sessions.clearContent: Do you really want to clear the active session?
sessions.draftNotice: Transaction draft: no actual purchase has been made yet.
sessions.persistentDraftNotice: Persistent draft: no actual purchase has been made yet.
sessions.sellerDropPlaceholder: Drop a player item here to add it to what they sell or give.
sessions.sellerDropTitle: Drop an item to sell or barter
sessions.sellerDialogTitle: Add an item sold or given
sessions.submittedNotice: The transaction is waiting for the merchant's decision.
sessions.authorizationCreatesSession: Authorizing a client automatically opens a session.
sessions.removeAuthorizationDeletesSession: Removing authorization will delete this client's active session.
sessions.sessionResetAfterDecision: After a final decision, the session will be reset.

check.title: Verification
check.sellerItemsOk: Items given or sold appear available.
check.merchantChangeOk: The merchant can make the necessary change.
check.playerMustPay: The player must pay an additional {amount} {currency}.
check.sellerSourceMissing: The source of {name} could not be verified.
check.merchantCurrencyInsufficient: The merchant does not have enough {currency} to make change.
check.alreadyValidated: The session is already marked as validated.

sessions.submittedMessage: This session is submitted and awaiting the merchant's decision.

preview.title: Transaction preview
preview.previewOnly: Preview only: no changes have been made yet.
preview.cannotExecute: The transaction cannot be executed as is.
preview.clientMissing: The session's client actor cannot be found.
preview.clientNotAuthorized: The client is no longer authorized to trade with this merchant.
preview.sellerItemMissing: Given or sold item not found: {name}.

confirm.validateContent: Do you want to validate this transaction session?
confirm.refuseContent: Do you want to refuse this transaction? No transaction will be performed and the session will be reset.

errors.clientMissing: The session's client actor cannot be found.
errors.clientNotAuthorized: The client is no longer authorized to trade with this merchant.
errors.serviceFreePriceInvalid: The proposed price for service {name} must be a strictly positive number.
errors.sellerItemMissing: Given or sold item not found: {name}.
errors.emptySession: The session contains no executable item.
errors.deliveryActorMissing: Cannot deliver item: recipient actor not found.
errors.deliveryItemDataMissing: Cannot deliver item: delivery data not found.
errors.deliveryQuantityInvalid: Cannot deliver item: delivery quantity is invalid.
errors.deliveryQuantityPathMissing: Cannot deliver item: quantity path not configured or not found.
errors.deliveryCreationFailed: Cannot create an item stack on the recipient actor.
errors.deliveryFailed: Cannot deliver the item to the recipient actor.
errors.deliveryQuantityMismatch: Cannot finalize transaction: delivered quantity does not match purchased quantity.
errors.activeNegotiation: Cannot validate transaction: a negotiation is still active.
errors.currencyConfigurationMissing: No currency is configured in the module.
errors.referenceCurrencyMissing: No reference currency could be determined.
errors.payerInsufficientFunds: {actor} does not have enough money to pay.
errors.receiverCannotMakeChange: {actor} does not have enough money to make change.

configuration.buyPercentHint: Percentage of the base price at which the merchant buys items back from players.
configuration.sellPercentHint: Percentage applied to the base price when the merchant sells to buyers.
configuration.serviceSellPercentHint: Percentage applied to the base price when the merchant sells a service to buyers.
configuration.negotiationFormulaHint: Formula rolled in chat for the manager, for example /roll 1d20 + 5.
configuration.noCurrencies: No currency is configured in the module settings.
configuration.sellPercentApplied: Prices adjusted according to the merchant's sell percentage.

empty.title: Configuration
empty.text: General merchant options and the transaction log will be grouped here.

itemCategoryI18nPrefix.label: Category i18n prefix
itemCategoryI18nPrefix.hint: Translation prefix added before the value read by the category path. Example: if the value is Armor and the prefix is CO.equipment.subtypes., MTT will look up CO.equipment.subtypes.Armor. Leave empty to display the raw value.

itemSubcategoryPath.label: Product subcategory path
itemSubcategoryPath.hint: Path read from the Item to display a discrete subcategory in the catalog. The subcategory appears as an icon with a tooltip on the product row. Leave empty to disable this feature.

itemSubcategoryI18nPrefix.label: Subcategory i18n prefix
itemSubcategoryI18nPrefix.hint: Translation prefix added before the value read by the subcategory path. Leave empty to display the raw value.

defaultCustomCategories.label: Default custom categories
defaultCustomCategories.hint: List of custom categories automatically added to new merchants. One category per line. These categories remain editable and deletable on each merchant.

importExport.title: Import / Export
importExport.hint: Import a ready-made MTT configuration for your game system before filling in paths manually, or export your current configuration to share it.
importExport.invalidFile: The selected file is not a valid MTT configuration.
importExport.unsupportedVersion: This MTT configuration file version is not supported.
importExport.importConfirmContent: Importing this configuration will replace the current MTT module settings.
importExport.systemMismatch: Warning: this configuration was exported for system {systemId}. The current system is {currentSystem}.

currencies.explanation: Define the currencies used in your game system. Each currency has a name, an abbreviation, a path to read the value on the actor, and a relative conversion value. Example: if the base coin is worth 1, a coin worth twice as much is worth 2, a coin worth half is worth 0.5.

columns.name: Name
columns.actorPathHint: Path to read and write this currency on an actor. Example: system.currency.sp
columns.itemPricePathHint: Path to read the amount of this currency on an Item. Example: system.price.value
columns.itemCurrencyPathHint: Path to read the Item currency when the system uses a single value + denomination field. Leave empty if each currency has its own price path. Example: system.price.currency
columns.itemCurrencyValuesHint: Comma-separated aliases used to identify this currency in the Item currency field. Example: pa, PA, sp, SP

actorTypes.title: Actor types convertible to MTT merchants
actorTypes.hint: Select which actor types from the active system may receive an MTT shop. MTT does not create actors automatically: the GM creates a normal actor and then converts it into an MTT shop.
actorTypes.noneAvailable: No actor type was detected for this system.
actorTypes.noneSelected: No actor type is currently allowed for conversion into an MTT merchant.
